title: cardamine pratensis subsp. iliciana
intro: Cardamine pratensis subsp. iliciana, also known as the lesser cuckooflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cardamine pratensis subsp. iliciana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cardamine pratensis subsp. iliciana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
